meta.title: Jana Samadhan — Government of Odisha
meta.description: File a grievance on WhatsApp in Odia or English. Government officers respond from a single command center with SLAs, audit trails, and accountability.

hero.lead: File a grievance on WhatsApp in Odia or English. Government officers respond from a single command center — with SLAs, audit trails, and accountability that survives transfers and political cycles.
